column1: Shall I turn on the light? - No, you _____ . It is still light in the room.
You _____ make your bed. I'll do it for you.
You _____ buy mineral water, we have plenty.
You _____ take an umbrella today. The sun is shining.
The meeting is very important. We _____ be late.
I _____ forget my keys or I won't get in.
You _____ bring sandwiches. We can stop at a cafe.
In this school pupils _____ wear school uniform. They can wear jeans and T-shirts.
